rulings.Case Title: CYNTHIA JOAN FARMER et al VS. ASBESTOS DEFENDANTS (B/P)AS REFLECTED ON EXHIBITS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION To Compel San Jose Water Company To Produce Its Custodian Of Records And Person Most Knowledgeable For Deposition And To Produce Documents At Deposition And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, July 27, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Plaintiffs¿ motion to compel San Jose Water Company to produce its custodian of records and person most knowledgeable for deposition and to produce documents at deposition: if the parties have not resolved issued raised by the motion before then, by 4:00 p.m. today they must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org and state, without any argument, what issues remain in dispute and then appear at the hearing tomorrow July 27 at 9am. = (220/HEK)
